metadata.title: Slaivio - Cargo OS
metadata.description: The Operating System for Cargo Agencies. Centralize WhatsApp, customers, cases, parcels, shipments, payments and multi-country operations in one platform.
metadata.ogDescription: The platform that centralizes and automates modern cargo agency operations.

hero.subtitle: SLAIVIO centralizes your customers, parcels, shipments, payments and WhatsApp in one platform. Save time, reduce errors and deliver a better customer experience.

problem.subtitle: Between WhatsApp, Excel, missed calls and paperwork, your teams lose time on repetitive tasks instead of focusing on your customers.

cards.title: Scattered WhatsApp
cards.text: Requests arrive across several phones, groups and private conversations. Important information can stay with one agent, follow-ups get missed, and nobody clearly knows what each customer is waiting for.
cards.impact: Your team responds more slowly and loses customer history.

cards.title: Excel and paperwork everywhere
cards.text: Rates, parcels, payments and routes live in separate files. When one row changes or a document is missing, the whole agency depends on manual checks.
cards.impact: Errors increase as soon as operation volume grows.

cards.title: Forgotten follow-ups
cards.text: Hot prospects, customers who need to pay, parcels to confirm and blocked cases do not surface automatically. Agents have to remember everything themselves.
cards.impact: Revenue stays pending and customers move elsewhere.

cards.title: Manual parcel tracking
cards.text: A customer asks where their parcel is, then the team searches WhatsApp, Excel, receipt photos or warehouse messages. The answer takes time and changes depending on the agent.
cards.impact: Trust drops because tracking is not instant.

cards.title: No visibility
cards.text: The manager cannot clearly see delayed cases, monthly revenue, untracked parcels or overloaded agents. Decisions are made from impressions, not reliable data.
cards.impact: You run the agency without an operational dashboard.

cards.title: Growth slows down
cards.text: The more customers your agency receives, the more manual methods create bottlenecks. Adding agents is no longer enough if operations remain scattered.
cards.impact: Growth becomes heavy instead of scalable.

workflow.subtitle: SLAIVIO supports every step, from the first request to final delivery. Everything is connected, automated and tracked in real time.

steps.title: Request intake
steps.text: Register customers and their requests from WhatsApp, at the office or online.

steps.title: Case & quote
steps.text: Create a case, add details, calculate rates and send the quote.

steps.title: Parcel reception
steps.text: Register parcels received at the warehouse, weigh them, label them and validate the information.

steps.title: Shipment & transit
steps.text: Consolidate, ship and track cargo from the warehouse until it reaches destination.

steps.title: Customs & delivery
steps.text: Manage documents, follow customs clearance and organize delivery to the customer.

steps.title: Payments & reports
steps.text: Track payments, generate reports and analyze your agency performance.

cards.title: WhatsApp connected
cards.text: Customer messages arrive in a shared inbox, linked to cases and visible to the whole team.

cards.title: Real-time tracking
cards.text: Every parcel keeps its history: warehouse, shipment, transit, arrival and final delivery.

cards.title: Automatic notifications
cards.text: SLAIVIO updates customers at the right time so agents stop repeating the same messages.

cards.title: Centralized documents
cards.text: Invoices, bills of lading, declarations and customer files stay attached to the right case.

cards.title: Smart reports
cards.text: See revenue, volume, strongest routes and delays so you decide with clear data.

cards.title: Secure data
cards.text: Access, roles and sensitive information are structured to protect every office and team.

features.titleLine1: All the features you need to
features.subtitle: SLAIVIO brings together the tools you need to manage your operations, teams and customers efficiently.
features.label: Feature

items.title: Dashboard
items.text: Track active customers, parcels in transit, shipments, revenue, notifications and WhatsApp messages from one central view. Managers understand agency health without opening ten tools.

items.title: Customer management
items.text: Group contact details, WhatsApp history, cases, parcels, payments and preferences for every customer. Agents instantly know who the customer is, what they need and what is in progress.

items.title: Case management
items.text: Every request becomes a clear case with quotes, parcels, documents, route, status and history. You avoid information scattered across Excel, WhatsApp and paper notebooks.

items.title: Parcel management
items.text: Register weight, dimensions, photos, warehouse, owner and status. Teams can quickly find a parcel and explain exactly where it is.

items.title: Shipments
items.text: Organize cargo by route, service, departure date, estimated arrival, progress and status. You see what is preparing, in transit, arrived or delivered.

items.title: Real-time tracking
items.text: View every step: received at warehouse, validated, in transit, arrived, delivered. Updates reduce repetitive calls and build customer trust.

items.title: Centralized WhatsApp
items.text: Every WhatsApp Business conversation arrives in a team inbox. Assign requests, connect messages to cases and prevent customers from waiting unanswered.

items.title: Payments
items.text: Track partial payments, balances, invoices and reminders. Your sales team knows who paid, who still owes and what needs follow-up.

items.title: Follow-ups
items.text: Automate payment and customer follow-ups through the most effective channel: WhatsApp, email or call. You reduce forgotten tasks and accelerate collections.

items.title: Broadcasts
items.text: Send bulk communications to announce arrivals, promotions, route changes or reminders. Your agency keeps communication clear at scale.

items.title: Knowledge base
items.text: Centralize answers, procedures, articles and resources used by the team and AI. Agents reply faster with consistent information.

items.title: WhatsApp AI
items.text: Automatically answer frequent questions about parcels, statuses, payments and delays. AI supports the team without replacing humans when a case needs judgment.

pricing.subtitle: All plans include the essential tools to manage your activity and grow your cargo agency.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.description: For specific needs and high volumes

faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about our platform, features and services.

items.question: What is Slaivio?
items.answer: Slaivio is an all-in-one platform built for cargo agencies. It centralizes customers, cases, shipments, payments and communications to automate operations and improve productivity.

items.question: What benefits does Slaivio bring to my agency?
items.answer: You reduce manual tasks, centralize WhatsApp, track shipments in real time, automate follow-ups and gain clearer visibility across your activity.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Yes. Data is encrypted, backed up automatically and hosted on secure cloud infrastructure with advanced access controls.

items.question: Can I integrate Slaivio with my current tools?
items.answer: Yes. Slaivio progressively integrates with WhatsApp Business, Gmail, TikTok and other professional services.

items.question: Is Slaivio suitable for small agencies?
items.answer: Yes. Starter plans are designed to support small agencies before they grow into Growth and Enterprise plans.

items.question: In which countries is Slaivio available?
items.answer: Slaivio is designed for cargo agencies operating in Africa and their international partners.

items.question: Which payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: Subscriptions can be paid by international bank card. Additional payment methods will progressively become available by country.

items.question: How can I get help when needed?
items.answer: Our support team assists each customer during setup, training and daily platform usage.
